script:
============================================================
DAILY AI & TECH NEWS BRIEF
Generated: 2025-11-11 08:22 UTC
Duration: ~50 seconds
============================================================

[HOOK - 0:00-0:05]
One AI agent to rule them all? Get ready! A groundbreaking coding breakthrough just dropped that could redefine your workflow *today*.

[STORY 1 - 0:05-0:18]
First, prepare for a revolution! A new analysis unveils 'The One Agent to Rule Them All' in advanced agentic coding. This is a paradigm shift, promising to massively boost your productivity and push AI development further. Don't miss this game-changer!

B-ROLL:
  - Futuristic UI displaying a 'Super Agent' graphic
  - Animated code lines transforming into a complex application
  - Developer looking amazed or highly productive

[STORY 2 - 0:18-0:31]
Next, engineers, get ready! Someone finally CRACKED Claude's agent skills. This detailed breakdown offers practical insights to master Claude’s agentic capabilities. Learn to optimize your prompts and build powerful AI agents *today*. Unlock its true power!

B-ROLL:
  - Claude AI logo and interface visuals
  - Screenshots of complex code snippets or agentic workflow diagrams
  - Engineer's hands typing furiously on a keyboard

[STORY 3 - 0:31-0:44]
Finally, speed is king! Claude HAIKU 4.5 just dropped, boasting LIGHT SPEED agentic coding. But can it truly BEAT Sonnet? This analysis helps you choose the optimal model for your tasks, balancing speed with effectiveness. Don't get left behind!

B-ROLL:
  - Speedometer graphic or 'LIGHT SPEED' animation
  - Comparison chart: 'Claude Haiku 4.5 vs Sonnet' performance metrics
  - Futuristic UI demonstrating fast code execution or processing

[CALL TO ACTION - 0:44-0:50]
That's your daily AI & Tech download! Don't miss another breakthrough – hit subscribe, ring the bell, and tell us: which agent are *you* betting on to rule them all?

============================================================
END OF SCRIPT
============================================================
